title: Unbreakable Enchantment
description: Have you always hated that the Unbreaking enchantment just isn't enough?
body:
### Problems:
Have you ever hated that the Unbreaking Enchantment is just never enough for your those who likes to grind tons of resources by hand, and is also sad that they cant use their favorite golden tools as an actually viable replacement for some netherite tools because of its the very low durability.

# Description:
well look no further to Unbreakable, the datapack that adds an enchantment to fix that!

## Unbreakable Enchantment Recipe:
![Unbreakable Enchantment Recipe!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a69f6b08d77c1296d8bbb8f061d5515f71d4790.png)


Unbreakable is an enchantment that makes any tool with durability unable to break, but if the tool is already damaged before the enchantment was applied, the durability will not be set to full durability.


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
- [Way too many Enchantments!](https://modrinth.com/collection/90b6VDPP)
